title: lychnis furcata subsp. elatior
intro: Lychnis furcata subsp. elatior, also known as the greater campion, is a flowering plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lychnis furcata subsp. elatior include its potential to alleviate urinary issues, reduce fever, and soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
